subject: task
body:
Sync — state of the hunt: #69-#72 are CLOSED+shipped (your watchdog note about #69 is stale). Open quality frontier = #73 (readability) + #47 (PixelLab, credit-blocked).

I audited #73 and found a REAL defect: both characters' hitboxes are vertically mis-centered vs their bodies (union-bbox strip frames + anchor center). Measured in-game vs floor top: Jack's feet sink 10.3px into the floor, Stalker 29.3px — and both shadows render BURIED inside the floor tile (shadowY matches frame feet, not floor surface). Repro: tools/qa73_matrix.cjs, shots in tools/ref/qa73/.

Split for best quality: I own the fix (SIDES areaY/areaOffY/shadowY + offset-aware HIT_W/HIT_H math + crouch interplay, then re-run the pose matrix). You own INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION: fresh-eyes review of my new contact sheet + playtest cling/ceil/hang/crawl-gap regressions, zero console errors, then sign off on #73. ACK if you're in.
